transcript: Look at this new video here. Police say we are watching three young men cross the street right here and steal a car that was double parked in West Philly. There's the car that's double parked. You see the three walking across the street right there. There were two young children inside the car. It's happened along 45th Street back on February 2nd. The car, you see, takes off with one of the thieves inside. The kid's also in there too, mind you. And now watch as the suspects bail out. The driver jumps out in a red coat. You see it creeping up there. There he goes, right into the sidewalk, bumping that car in front of it. All three make a run for it after stealing that car. No one's behind the wheel. You saw that bump and run right there with the car in front of it. The kids, we can report, thankfully, they're fine. But police want you to call them if you recognize any of these suspects.
